titleStmt.title: SII 16.142: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 142. (A.R. No. 16 of 1928.) VĒPARLAPARTI, KALYANADURG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone lying near the ruined temple of Raṅgasvāmin.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhin, Phālguna śu. 11 corresponding to 1545 A.D., February 22, (Sunday).

It registers the grant of tax at the rate of a māḍa and a dharaṇa per month for maintaining a perpetual lamp for god Tiruveṅgaḷanātha of Vēpalapariti by Suṁkara Rāmi-seṭṭi for the merit of Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Kuṁḍrurpi Koṇḍala-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī vijeyādbhudaya śālivāhana śakhaEach line begins with a cipher.
varuṣaṁbulu 1466 nēṭi krōdhi saṁvatsara phālguṇa śu 11
puṇyakālamaṁdu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrī sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu pṛthivirājyaṁ cēyucuṁṇagānu śrīmaṁ
mahānāyaṁkācā¨rrya laina kuṁḍru¨rpi koṁḍalanāyanigāriki puṁṇyamugānu śuṁkkaThe repha is redundant.
ra rāmiseṭi vēpalapariti tiruveṁgaḷanāthani naṁdādīpa samārādhana
ku suṁkaṁ vaga māḍa Anupu vaga dharaṇaṁ vubhayaṁ nela vokaṁṭiki
māḍādharaṇaṁ lekhanu sama¨rpiṁcagalavāraṁ Ī suṁkaṁ yavaru
sēsinānu I mariyāda naḍapagalavāru yiṁduku yevaru tapinā
nu tama tallitaṁḍrādula vāraṇāsilō vadhiyiṁcina pāpāna pō
vuduru .
Digital edition of SII 16.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
